user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new user defined field, so that I can capture additional employee data not covered by standard fields
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the User Defined Fields screen; When I click Add new user defined field and set its name, field type, mandatory and default flags; Then the field is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to mark a user defined field as mandatory or default, so that required data is always captured
acceptance_criteria: Given I am creating a user defined field; When I set the Mandatory and Is Default flags; Then the field is stored with those settings

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to reorder user defined fields, so that they appear in a logical sequence on forms
acceptance_criteria: Given user defined fields exist; When I use Fields Order to rearrange them; Then the new order is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save my user defined field configuration, so that the changes take effect
acceptance_criteria: Given I have added or reordered fields; When I click Save; Then the configuration is persisted

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view all user defined fields with their type, mandatory and default status, so that I can review the custom field setup
acceptance_criteria: Given user defined fields exist; When I open the list; Then each row shows Field name, Field type, Mandatory and Is Default
